user.title: Golmar / Quvii account
user.description: Sign in with your Golmar G2Call+ account (or another Quvii-based intercom app). Credentials are used once to fetch each panel's local key; door control afterwards is 100% local. Leave App ID / OEM ID as-is for Golmar.

select.title: Choose which doors to control
select.description: Tick the panels and locks you actually use — the same ones you open from the official Golmar app. Block entrances appear as "Door N" and street entrances as "General Panel N", each with two lock relays. Only the channels physically wired to your panel open anything; the rest are accepted by the panel but do nothing. You can change this later in the integration's options.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Quvii cloud.
error.no_devices: Login worked but no devices were found on this account.

init.title: Doors to control
init.description: Update which panels and locks appear as buttons — match what you open from the official Golmar app. Only channels wired to your panel actually open; untick the rest.
